reason: Token boundary: platform may only record reference usage for owners; no recharge, settlement, market, or platform cut; token use is not visitor-visible.
LLMConfig/token_used are owner-visible; API key is sensitive and must not be exposed to visitors.
Frontend verification and Playwright self-acceptance requirements for visual owner UI.
Owner panel UI must remain polished, accessible, mobile-safe, and not admin-bare.
Token status is derived local display state; no new global state or billing persistence.
Normalize dynamic Tavern/LLM/token payloads and do not expose api_key.
Safe derived owner token reference stats; strips API key material and avoids billing semantics.
Owner AI section renders token reference status panel with no billing/API-key copy.
